name: sitemd
description: The complete sitemd toolkit for Claude Code — a full suite of MCP tools and skills, plus a complete website framework. Requires the sitemd binary; auto-fetched via the npm postinstall hook (recommended: scaffold a project with `npx @sitemd-cc/sitemd init`) or via `./sitemd/install` after `/plugin install sitemd` inside an existing project.
